initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT sets.releaseDate, GROUP_CONCAT(legalities.format) AS legal_formats
FROM cards
JOIN legalities ON legalities.uuid = cards.id
JOIN sets ON cards.id = sets.id
WHERE legalities.status = 'Legal'
ORDER BY sets.releaseDate ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT DISTINCT sets.releaseDate, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT legalities.format) AS legalFormats
FROM cards
JOIN legalities ON legalities.uuid = cards.id
JOIN sets ON cards.id = sets.id
WHERE cards.availability = 'mythic'
ORDER BY sets.releaseDate ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT sets.releaseDate, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT legalities.format) AS legal_formats
FROM cards
JOIN legalities ON cards.id = legalities.uuid
JOIN sets ON cards.id = sets.id
WHERE legalities.status = 'Legal'
AND sets.releaseDate IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY sets.releaseDate ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT DISTINCT sets.releaseDate, GROUP_CONCAT(legalities.format) AS legal_formats
FROM cards
JOIN legalities ON legalities.uuid = cards.id
JOIN sets ON cards.id = sets.id
WHERE legalities.status = 'Legal'
ORDER BY sets.releaseDate ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT DISTINCT sets.releaseDate, GROUP_CONCAT(legalities.format) AS legal_formats
FROM cards
JOIN legalities ON legalities.uuid = cards.id
JOIN sets ON cards.id = sets.id
WHERE legalities.status = 'Legal'
ORDER BY sets.releaseDate ASC
LIMIT 1;

aggregation.selected_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT sets.releaseDate, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT legalities.format) AS legalFormats
FROM cards
JOIN legalities ON legalities.uuid = cards.id
JOIN sets ON cards.id = sets.id
WHERE cards.availability = 'mythic'
ORDER BY sets.releaseDate ASC
LIMIT 1;
